name: Adele Givens
blurb: She was one of the stars of The Queens of Comedy tour alongside Mo'Nique, Sommore, and Laura Hayes.
bio: Adele Givens is an American comedian, actress, and writer who emerged in the late 1980s and became one of the most popular performers on HBOs Def Comedy Jam, where she earned the nickname Queen of Comedy. She was one of the stars of The Queens of Comedy tour alongside Mo'Nique, Sommore, and Laura Hayes. Her film appearances include The Players Club and Beauty Shop.

timeline.ev: Wins the Crown Royal Comedy Contest in Chicago
Becomes a popular performer on Def Comedy Jam
Appears in the film The Players Club
Stars in The Queens of Comedy tour and special
Appears in the film Beauty Shop
Featured in Kanye West and Lil Pumps single I Love It

accolades: Nicknamed Queen of Comedy for her Def Comedy Jam performances
Star of The Queens of Comedy tour and Showtime special
1989 Grand Prize Winner of the Crown Royal Comedy Contest
